meta.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro AI Video Generator | Native Audio + Lip-sync | OpenCreator
meta.description: Preview ByteDance Seedance 1.5 Pro with native audio-video generation, lip-sync, and multilingual dialogue. OpenCreator prelaunch page.

hero.description: ByteDance's Seedance 1.5 Pro generates video and audio simultaneously within a shared latent space, producing tight lip-sync and natural foley without post-processing. Supports 4-12 second videos at 720p with dialogue, sound effects, and ambient audio.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Built for marketing, dialogue, and multilingual content

nativeAudio.title: Native audio-video generation
nativeAudio.description: Dual-branch diffusion transformer generates sound, dialogue, and visuals in a single pass for tighter sync.

lipsync.title: Precise lip-sync
lipsync.description: Unified latent space ensures tight alignment between speech and mouth movements without post-processing.

multilingual.title: Multilingual workflows
multilingual.description: Create variants across languages while maintaining a consistent visual story.

camera.title: Cinematic camera control
camera.description: Support for pan, tilt, zoom, dolly, and tracking shots for film-like sequences.

consistency.title: Character consistency
consistency.description: Keep characters and styling stable across multiple clips in a sequence.

marketing.title: Marketing-ready outputs
marketing.description: Designed for short-form drama, ad spots, product demos, and talking-head content.

gallery.title: Use Cases
gallery.subtitle: Representative OpenCreator workflows for Seedance 1.5 Pro

lipsync.title: Talking-head content
lipsync.useCase: Create speaking scenes where audio and mouth movements stay naturally aligned.

product.title: Product ads
product.useCase: Generate product clips with voiceover-style narration and ambient sound effects.

story.title: Short narratives
story.useCase: Build consistent stories across clips with stable style, characters, and audio.

comparison.title: Model Comparison
comparison.subtitle: How Seedance 1.5 Pro compares to other video models

pricing.title: Coming Soon
pricing.subtitle: Seedance 1.5 Pro will be available on OpenCreator soon
pricing.description: Native audio-video generation model from ByteDance
pricing.note: We will publish OpenCreator pricing and availability details after integration is complete.

0.question: What makes Seedance 1.5 Pro different from other video models?
0.answer: Seedance 1.5 Pro uses a dual-branch diffusion transformer that generates video and audio simultaneously within a shared latent space. This produces tight lip-sync and natural foley without requiring separate post-processing steps.

1.question: What types of audio can Seedance 1.5 Pro generate?
1.answer: It generates dialogue, sound effects, and ambient audio. Supports cinematic camera work including pan, tilt, zoom, dolly, and tracking shots.

2.question: What resolution and duration does it support?
2.answer: Seedance 1.5 Pro generates videos at 720p resolution with durations from 4 to 12 seconds. Higher resolutions may be available on alternative platforms.

3.question: How much will it cost on OpenCreator?
3.answer: Pricing will be published after Seedance 1.5 Pro is integrated. Costs are expected to depend on resolution, duration, and audio settings.

4.question: Is Seedance 1.5 Pro available on OpenCreator now?
4.answer: Not yet. This is a prelaunch page for upcoming availability.
